<?php namespace Illuminate\View\Concerns; trait ManagesTranslations { /** * The translation replacements for the translation being rendered. * * @var array */ protected $translationReplacements = []; /** * Start a translation block. * * @param array $replacements * @return void */ public function startTranslation($replacements = []) { ob_start(); $this->translationReplacements = $replacements; } /** * Render the current translation. * * @return string */ public function renderTranslation() { return $this->container->make('translator')->get( trim(ob_get_clean()), $this->translationReplacements ); } }
